passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text: Passes admit 4 people for 50% off regular museum admission rates. Please check their website for the individual museums days and hours that they are open.
source_phrases: Passes admit 4 people for 50% off regular museum admission rates. Please check their website for the individual museums days and hours that they are open.

passes.title: Harvard Museums Of Science And Culture
passes.benefit_text: Pass gives patrons half price  admission for up to four people.
source_phrases: Pass gives patrons half price  admission for up to four people.

passes.title: The House Of Seven Gables
passes.benefit_text:
Pass admits up to 2 visitors at the discounted price of $10 per admission. Admission is free to anyone 18 and under. The ICA is free to all on Thursday nights from 5:00-9:00pm.
Please note that Museum hours and admission are subject to change. Current information can be found  on their website: https://www.icaboston.org/visit
Advance reservation strongly recommended.
Cannot be used for performances or special events.
Does not guarantee admittance to special exhibitions with timed entry.

passes.title: Institute Of Contemporary Art Boston
passes.benefit_text:
Pass admits 4 people for $5 a person. Children under the age of 18 are always admitted free.
When reserving Gardner Museum timed entry tickets online, you will submit the promo code, select the correct date and your chosen timed entry, and continue checking out (the discount will be applied at checkout). Tickets must be reserved at least 48 hours prior to visiting—this library pass does not guarantee a reservation to the Museum. If you have any issues reserving your tickets you can call the Gardner Museum's Box Office at 617-278-5156. Patrons must present both this library pass and Museum timed tickets for admission into the Museum. For more information, please visit:  isgm.org/welcome .
source_phrases: Pass admits 4 people for $5 a person. Children under the age of 18 are always admitted free.

If you have any issues reserving your tickets you can call the Gardner Museum's Box Office at 617-278-5156. Patrons must present both this library pass and Museum timed tickets for admission into the Museum. For more information, please visit:  isgm.org/welcome .

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text: Passes are no longer required—the presentation of a valid library card grants the cardholder 50% off of one admission ticket—but please place a reservation for the desired date of your visit.  Visitors aged 12 and under receive free admission. Please visit JFK Museum's website for more details and to reserve tickets in advance.

Please visit JFK Museum's website for more details and to reserve tickets in advance.

passes.title: John F Kennedy Library And Museum
passes.benefit_text: The one-day pass is valid for up to 4 people to a Mass Audubon wildlife sanctuary. At some sanctuaries there is a $2 admission fee per visitor over the age of 2.
source_phrases: The one-day pass is valid for up to 4 people to a Mass Audubon wildlife sanctuary. At some sanctuaries there is a $2 admission fee per visitor over the age of 2.

passes.title: Mass Audubon
passes.benefit_text: Pass provides free parking for 1 car
source_phrases: Pass provides free parking for 1 car

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text:
Pass admits 2 adults at $10 a person (general admission and special exhibition) and up to 4 children ages 7-17 at $10 each (general and special exhibition). There is no discount for children 7-17 for general admisson, currently $10. Children under 6 are admitted free. 
Please note, as of January 20, 2026, there is a ticket price increase. Pass for two adult tickets will be ($15 each) and four youth tickets ($10 each). Promo codes are redeemable online, over the phone, or at any MFA ticket desk. Passes are not applicable toward discounts on shopping, parking, dining, films, concerts, lectures, courses, or any other public programs. All prices are subject to change. Discount admission may not be combined with other offers. When planning your visit, please check www.mfa.org/visit for current Museum hours and early closings. The Museum is closed on New Year’s Day, Patriots’ Day, Fourth of July, Thanksgiving, and Christmas.
source_phrases: Pass admits 2 adults at $10 a person (general admission and special exhibition) and up to 4 children ages 7-17 at $10 each (general and special exhibition). There is no discount for children 7-17 for general admisson, currently $10. Children under 6 are admitted free.

Passes are not applicable toward discounts on shopping, parking, dining, films, concerts, lectures, courses, or any other public programs. All prices are subject to change. Discount admission may not be combined with other offers. When planning your visit, please check www.mfa.org/visit for current Museum hours and early closings. The Museum is closed on New Year’s Day, Patriots’ Day, Fourth of July, Thanksgiving, and Christmas.

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text:
1. This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under the age of 3 are also free, and do not count towards the 4 visitor limit.
 2. Your Library pass can only be used on the date printed on the pass.
 3. Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit.
  4. When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass and purchase your  Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00am - 5:00pm daily).
   5. If you are not able to show your Library confirmation on a phone, you may print out a copy using the link in the confirmation email or request a paper copy from the library.
source_phrases: 1. This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under the age of 3 are also free, and do not count towards the 4 visitor limit.
2. Your Library pass can only be used on the date printed on the pass.
3. Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit.

4. When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass and purchase your  Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00am - 5:00pm daily).
5. If you are not able to show your Library confirmation on a phone, you may print out a copy using the link in the confirmation email or request a paper copy from the library.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
source_phrases: 50% off admission for a family of up to 5 adults/children.

Tickets can be purchased in advance by selecting the Library Museum Pass option on the museum website. An ePass can either be presented on a mobile device or as a print-out to receive the discounted admission rate in-person. If the library pass is not presented at the museum, you will be charged the difference for full price tickets.

Valid only on the date listed on the pass, subject to museum capacity. Due to a high volume of visitors, it is best to reserve museum tickets online or call the museum to hold tickets, or to confirm availability the day of before visiting the North Shore Children's Museum.

passes.title: North Shore Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text: Pass admits 2 people for $12 a person
source_phrases: Pass admits 2 people for $12 a person

passes.title: Plimoth Patuxet Museums
passes.benefit_text: Pass admits 6 people at $14.00 for adults and $11.75 for children. You must bring the orange pass to the museum to receive the discounted price. Anyone arriving without the orange pass will need to pay full rate on arrival to the museum. Library passes are not accepted in the month of October.

Anyone arriving without the orange pass will need to pay full rate on arrival to the museum. Library passes are not accepted in the month of October.

passes.title: Salem Witch Museum
passes.benefit_text: Pass admits 2 adults and children under 18. Prices vary by location.

passes.title: Trustees Of The Reservations
passes.benefit_text: Pass admits 5 people for free, one pass per party.

passes.title: The Uss Constitution Museum
passes.benefit_text: Pass admits 6 people at $9 per adult and $6 per child. Children under 2 are free.
